title: Conflict Stages, Semantic Resolution, and Rerere
description: A repeated long-running integration conflicts across generated code, renamed policy files, and tests; previous manual resolutions are inconsistent and one clean textual result changes behavior. Learners cumulatively produce three-stage conflict and rerere resolution dossier through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Inspect stage 1 base, stage 2 ours, stage 3 theirs, unmerged entries, and higher-order conflict metadata before editing.
Distinguish content, add/add, delete/modify, rename, directory/file, binary, mode, submodule, and recursive conflicts and select evidence for each.
Reconstruct intent from base and both histories, produce a semantic combined result, and test invariants that neither side tested alone.
